page_description: I'm a Software Product Engineer specializing in building scalable web applications and cloud-native solutions.
bio_text_1: I take a product first approach, deeply understanding the domain knowledge that expert users rely on, so that business objectives and user experience drive every architectural decision I make. Software, at its core, is a tool to empower domain experts, and I build with that in mind. I've delivered production planning and supply chain features for brewery management software using Angular and .NET on Azure, built real time IoT data pipelines processing sensor telemetry, and engineered hotel package management, user onboarding, and menu item management interfaces using Next.js and Ruby on Rails.
bio_text_2: ; I'm always up for a chat!
tech_experience_text: I have a wide range of experience with different technologies. Most of my experience is in the JavaScript and .NET Core ecosystems. I also have experience within DevOps more specifically in the Azure ecosystem. I adapt quickly to the technology stack required for a project and don't limit myself to my current domain of experience.
tech_experience_click_hint: Try clicking on a skill to view projects where I have used it
projects_by_tech_text: I don't find skill levels particularly measurable, but I want to provide context into where I've used different technologies. My proficiency is based on real project experience.
bio_text_3a: Outside of the keyboard, I'm an
bio_text_3b: . The same discipline I use when reading a bouldering problem is exactly the mindset I bring to hard technical problems.
